title: Senior SEO Specialist at Urban Ladder Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Senior SEO Specialist at Urban Ladder Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Urban Ladder Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Chennai-based team.

About Urban Ladder Advisory Limited:
Urban Ladder Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Urban Ladder Advisory Limited!
